path: Problem: Return an intersecting value from a 2D table using one row criterion and multiple header criteria (multi-row header) to select the correct column
Action: INDEX with two MATCH functions; second MATCH searches a concatenated multi-row header array to find the target column
Observation: When column headers are split across multiple rows (e.g., item + period + metric), concatenating those header rows creates a unique composite key that MATCH can locate
Problem: Build a dynamic lookup key from fixed text plus user-selected filters to retrieve the correct metric column
Action: Concatenate literal text with filter cells to form the lookup value used by MATCH
Observation: If the source table’s header labels follow a consistent naming pattern, constructing the same pattern from filters avoids hardcoding column positions and supports copy-across
